full_text:
Dongli Gun 东里衮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dongli Gun (东里衮). He fought bravely to escape when Wan rebelled. Later aided Cao Ren in retaking the city. Dongli Gun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
